questions.code:
type T = { a: string; b: number };
type Keys = keyof T;
questions.explanation: keyof T is the union of its property keys.

questions.code:
const cfg = { host: 'x', port: 80 };
type Cfg = typeof cfg;
questions.explanation: typeof value → its inferred type. Use `as const` to keep literals.

questions.prompt: get<T, K extends keyof T>(o: T, k: K): T[K] — this is:
questions.explanation: Indexed access T[K] flows the right property type back.
